title: elaphoglossum kessleri
intro: Elaphoglossum kessleri, also known as Kessler's elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum kessleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and treat various infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts.
